query.sparql:
SELECT ?item WHERE {
  wd:Q131964 wdt:P31 wd:Q35657;  # instance of a historical entity
              wdt:P17 wd:Q40.     # located in Italy
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q35657;       # instance of a historical entity
        wdt:P17 wd:Q40;          # located in Italy
        wdt:P580 ?start;         # start time of the entity
        wdt:P582 ?end.           # end time of the entity
  FILTER(?start <= "1866-10-03T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?end >= "1866-10-03T00:00:00Z") # date of the Austro-Prussian War
}

SELECT (SUM(?oscarWins) AS ?totalOscars) WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P57 wd:Q55400.
  ?movie wdt:P166 ?award.
  ?award wdt:P31 wd:Q5397;  # instance of award
         wdt:P166 wd:Q19020. # won an Oscar
  BIND(1 AS ?oscarWins)
}

SELECT (SUM(?population) AS ?totalPopulation) WHERE {
  ?city wdt:P31 wd:Q515;  # instance of city
        wdt:P17 wd:Q79;   # located in Egypt
        wdt:P1082 ?population.  # population
  ?city wdt:P625 ?coordinates.  # coordinates of the city
  FILTER(geofilter(?coordinates, "Nile River"))
}

Is the district of Höxter next to the district of Paderborn?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?district1 ?district2 WHERE {
  wd:Q16107 wdt:P31 wd:Q5;  # Höxter is an instance of a human settlement
              wdt:P150 ?district1.  # Höxter has a part
  wd:Q2971 wdt:P31 wd:Q5;  # Paderborn is an instance of a human settlement
              wdt:P150 ?district2.  # Paderborn has a part
  ?district1 wdt:P31 wd:Q5;  # Ensure district1 is a human settlement
              wdt:P31 wd:Q5.  # Ensure district2 is a human settlement
  ?district1 wdt:P131 ?district2.  # Check if district1 is located in the same administrative region as district2
}

  ?company wdt:P31 wd:Q4830453;  # instance of Big Tech company

question.string: Who is the soccer player with the most goals in their career?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel (SUM(?goals) AS ?totalGoals) WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P31 wd:Q9376;  # instance of soccer player
          wdt:P3373 ?club.   # member of a sports team
  ?club wdt:P31 wd:Q476028; # instance of sports team
        wdt:P1344 ?goals.   # has scored goals
}
GROUP BY ?player ?playerLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?totalGoals)
LIMIT 1

question.string: what is the oldest film festival?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?festival ?festivalLabel ?year WHERE {
  ?festival wdt:P31 wd:Q18537020;  # instance of film festival
            wdt:P580 ?year.        # start time
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?festival wdt:P580 ?laterYear. FILTER(?laterYear < ?year) } # ensure it's the oldest
}
ORDER BY ASC(?year)
LIMIT 1
